name: Macro Input
description: Defines an input port for a macro. Place this node in a workflow to expose it as an input when the workflow is used as a macro.
doc:
Define an input parameter for a macro workflow.

Usage:
1. Add to a macro workflow
2. Set the input name and type
3. Connect to nodes that need the input value
4. The input appears as a handle on the Macro node

Properties:
• Name - label shown on the macro node
• Type - expected data type (for validation)
• Default - fallback if nothing connected
• Required - whether input must be provided

Tip: Use clear, descriptive names like 'Image' or 'Prompt' instead of generic names.

outputs.name: Value
outputs.description: The input value passed to this macro port

properties.name: Input Name
properties.description: Name of this input (shown on macro node handle)

properties.name: Default Value
properties.description: Default value if no input is connected
